info.title: Personal Digital Twin Assistant API
info.description: Backend API for the Personal Digital Twin productivity assistant

get.description: Get all items for current user with optional filters

schema.title: Response Get Items Api Items Get

patch.description: Update item status (quick action for marking done/undone)

get.description: Fetch recent chat history for the user

schema.title: Response Get Chat History Api Chat History Get

post.description:
Main chat endpoint — routes to the appropriate agent via the Orchestrator.
Returns a unified response with agent name, message, items, schedule, and/or reflection.

get.description: Get scheduled items for the user within an optional date range.

schema.title: Response Get Schedule Api Schedule Get

put.description: Update a scheduled item's time block (for drag-and-drop on frontend).

get.description: Export all scheduled items as an .ics calendar file.
Get all items as nodes and all item_links as edges for the knowledge graph.

post.description: Create a manual link between two items.
Analyze the user's items and create AI-suggested graph links.

delete.description: Delete a link between two items.

get.description: Return active long-term memory and recent extraction events.

post.description: Save a user-approved AI memory fact.

get.description: Return a short guided profile questionnaire.

schema.title: Response Get Profile Questions Api Profile Questions Get

post.description: Save reviewed questionnaire answers as explicit user-approved memory.

schema.title: Response Submit Profile Questions Api Profile Questions Post

put.description: Correct an active AI memory fact.

delete.description: Remove an active AI memory fact.

get.description: Return command-center analytics scoped to the current user.

ClassifiedItem.description: Schema for a classified item from AI

DashboardAnalyticsResponse.description: Dashboard analytics payload for the premium command center.

DashboardTelemetry.description: High-level agent and knowledge system metrics.

DashboardVelocityPoint.title: DashboardVelocityPoint
DashboardVelocityPoint.description: Cumulative knowledge graph growth for a day.

GraphAnalyzeResponse.title: GraphAnalyzeResponse
GraphAnalyzeResponse.description: Response returned after graph analysis creates or reuses links.

GraphData.title: GraphData
GraphData.description: Schema for the knowledge graph data

ItemCreate.title: ItemCreate
ItemCreate.description: Schema for creating an item manually

ItemLinkCreate.title: ItemLinkCreate
ItemLinkCreate.description: Schema for creating a link between two items

MemoryCandidateResponse.title: MemoryCandidateResponse
MemoryCandidateResponse.description: Unsaved long-term fact candidate that needs user confirmation.

MessageResponse.title: MessageResponse
MessageResponse.description: Schema for returning a single chat message from history

ProfileQuestionAnswer.title: ProfileQuestionAnswer
ProfileQuestionAnswer.description: Reviewed questionnaire answer that can be stored as memory.

ProfileQuestionResponse.title: ProfileQuestionResponse
ProfileQuestionResponse.description: A guided question used to collect user-approved profile memory.

ProfileQuestionnaireSubmit.title: ProfileQuestionnaireSubmit
ProfileQuestionnaireSubmit.description: Batch payload for saving reviewed questionnaire answers.

ProfileUpdateResponse.title: ProfileUpdateResponse
ProfileUpdateResponse.description: Append-only memory extraction event shown in the profile feed.

ReflectionSummary.title: ReflectionSummary
ReflectionSummary.description: Schema for reflection data from the Reflection/Planner Agent

ScheduleBlock.title: ScheduleBlock
ScheduleBlock.description: Schema for a scheduled time block from the Scheduler Agent

ScheduleUpdate.title: ScheduleUpdate
ScheduleUpdate.description: Schema for updating a schedule block

UserContextCreate.title: UserContextCreate
UserContextCreate.description: Payload for explicitly saving a new long-term memory fact.

UserContextResponse.title: UserContextResponse
UserContextResponse.description: Current long-term memory fact shown in the profile UI.

UserContextUpdate.title: UserContextUpdate
UserContextUpdate.description: Payload for correcting an active long-term memory fact.

UserProfileMemoryResponse.title: UserProfileMemoryResponse
UserProfileMemoryResponse.description: Current profile memory plus recent extraction log.
